smart_contract_development.heading: Our Smart Contract Development Process
smart_contract_development.description: Our process is designed to minimise risk and ensure predictable delivery for blockchain applications.

steps.title: Requirements & Threat Modelling
steps.desc: We define contract responsibilities, trust assumptions, attack vectors, and upgrade requirements.

steps.title: Architecture & Design Specification
steps.desc: Contract interfaces, access controls, state transitions, and dependency mappings are documented before development.

steps.title: Smart Contract Development
steps.desc: We implement contracts using clean, testable Solidity code with strict versioning and linting standards.

steps.title: Testing & Audit Preparation
steps.desc: Unit tests, integration tests, edge-case simulations, and gas profiling are performed before audit.

steps.title: Deployment & Post-Launch Support
steps.desc: We manage deployment, verification, monitoring, and upgrades where applicable.

web3_app_development.heading: Our Web3 Development Process
web3_app_development.description: A structured approach designed to reduce risk and deliver reliable outcomes.

steps.title: Discovery & Architecture
steps.desc: We define use cases, blockchain selection, and system architecture aligned with business goals.

steps.title: Smart Contract Design
steps.desc: Smart contract logic is defined, reviewed, and built with security and upgradeability in mind.

steps.title: Web3 Application Development
steps.desc: Front-end and back-end Web3 components are developed with a focus on usability and performance.

steps.title: Integration & Testing
steps.desc: Wallets, APIs, and blockchain networks are integrated and tested across environments.

steps.title: Deployment & Support
steps.desc: We deploy the Web3 application and provide ongoing maintenance, upgrades, and monitoring.

nft_development.heading: Our NFT Development Process
nft_development.description: A structured approach designed to reduce risk and ensure delivery.

steps.title: Discovery & Use Case Definition
steps.desc: We define the NFT use case, platform requirements, and blockchain selection.

steps.title: Smart Contract Design
steps.desc: NFT logic, standards, royalties, and upgrade paths are defined and reviewed.

steps.title: Platform Development
steps.desc: Marketplace, minting tools, and integrations are developed with usability and performance in mind.

steps.title: Testing & Security Review
steps.desc: Smart contracts and platform components are tested for reliability and security.

steps.title: Deployment & Support
steps.desc: We deploy the platform and provide ongoing maintenance, updates, and optimisation.

wallet_integration.heading: Our Crypto Wallet Development Process
wallet_integration.description: A structured approach designed to reduce risk and ensure delivery.

steps.title: Discovery & Architecture
steps.desc: We define wallet type, custody model, supported assets, and security requirements.

steps.title: Wallet Design
steps.desc: User flows, key management logic, and security layers are mapped and reviewed.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Wallet logic, UI, and integrations are implemented using proven blockchain libraries and frameworks.

steps.title: Testing & Security Validation
steps.desc: Extensive functional, security, and transaction testing is performed before deployment.

steps.title: Deployment & Support
steps.desc: We deploy the wallet and provide ongoing maintenance, updates, and optimisation.

smart_contract_audits.heading: Our Smart Contract Audit Methodology
smart_contract_audits.description: We follow a structured audit process designed to uncover both technical and economic risks.

steps.title: Scope Definition & Threat Modelling
steps.desc: We review contract purpose, architecture, and intended behaviour to understand risk exposure and attack surfaces.

steps.title: Manual Code Review
steps.desc: Our auditors perform a detailed line-by-line analysis of the smart contract codebase, focusing on reentrancy, access control, arithmetic issues, state manipulation, and permission misconfigurations.

steps.title: Automated Analysis
steps.desc: We supplement manual review with industry-standard automated tools to detect known vulnerability patterns.

steps.title: Business Logic Validation
steps.desc: We validate that the contract behaves exactly as intended under real-world conditions, edge cases, and failure scenarios.

steps.title: Findings Report & Risk Classification
steps.desc: Each issue is categorised by severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low) with clear explanations and remediation guidance.
